title: Create ticket when email is sent to and from the same address.

posts.author: ErinBrown (Erin)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Monday.com does not register emails to and from the same email as valid emails, so no ticket is generated.

What are you trying to achieve

We would like to enable tickets to be created in Monday’s Service portal when an email is sent from and to the same address.
